versions.version_description: Better than the other chords better played if you use Gm7 bar 3rd fret nuber 30 on the chord list and use Dm7 bar 5th fret nuber 4 on chord list.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.
Newly revised. Includes strumming patterns and improved chord placement.

content:
[Verse 1] (Usher)
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
There's always that one person[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
That will always have your heart[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
You'll never see it coming[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
Cause you're blinded from the start[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
Know that you're that one for me[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
It's clear for everyone to see[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch] 
Ooh baby   oh [/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]
   that you will always be my boo[/tab]


[Break] (Alicia)
[tab]                                [ch]G[/ch]
I don't know bout cha'll, but I know about us and uh[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                           [ch]G[/ch]
   This is the only way we know how to rock[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
I don't know bout cha'll, but I know about us and uh[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                           [ch]G[/ch]
   This is the only way we know how to rock[/tab]


[Verse 2] (Usher)
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]            
Do you remember girl[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
I was the one who gave you your first kiss[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch] 
Cause I remember girl[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
I was the one who said put your lips like this[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
Even    before all the fame and[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
    People screaming your name[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
   Girl I was there, and you were my baby[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
It started when we were younger[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
You were mine, (my boo)[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
Now another brother's taking over[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
But it's still in your eyes, (my boo)[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]  
Even though we used to argue it's alright (my boo)[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
I know we haven't seen each other[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]
In awhile but you will always be my boo[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab]                                     [ch]G[/ch]
I was in love with you when we were younger[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
You were mine,  (my boo)[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
And I see it from time to time,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
I still feel like (my boo)[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]  
And I can see it no matter[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
How I try to hide (my boo)[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]
Even though there's another man who's in my life[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]
You will always be my boo[/tab]

[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]                 
Yes I remember boy, cause after we kissed[/tab]

I could only think about your lips[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]F[/ch]
Yes I remember boy, the moment I knew you were the one[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]G[/ch]
I could spend my life with[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
